expectations.evidence: Ran ~15 custom queries but missed several from the standard 17 (no bezodplatne, no konzorcia, no supplier_advantage, no double debtors query)
Uses custom structure: Celkovy prehlad, Prehlad Red Flags, Najvyssie rizikove zistenia, Koncentracia, Casove vzory — not the 6 standard categories
Has 'Odporucania na hlbsi vysetrovanie' section with prioritized list, though not in table format
Section 1 'Celkovy prehlad' has contract count, amounts, flag counts
Report draws direct conclusions like 'priamy rozpor so zakonom o verejnom obstaravani' without noting these need validation
